Common Schedules Reference

* * * * * Every minute
*/5 * * * * Every 5 minutes
0 * * * * Every hour
0 0 * * * Every day at midnight
0 0 * * 0 Every Sunday at midnight
0 0 1 * * First of every month
0 3 * * * Every day at 3 AM
0 */6 * * * Every 6 hours

Add SSH Key

Paste your public key (usually from ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub or ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub)

Use absolute paths. Output is captured in user's cron logs.

-1 = unlimited
